name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-81
title: build-targets.py: marker-write only on SKILL.md targets — misses skill scripts/resources updates
description: scripts/build-targets.py lines 53-57: appends to .rabbit-skills-updated ONLY when the copy-file target's destination matches '^\.claude/skills/([^/]+)/SKILL\.md$'. If a skill ships scripts (e.g., skills/rabbit-config/scripts/rabbit-config.py is a copy-file target whose destination is .claude/skills/rabbit-config/scripts/rabbit-config.py), build will copy the updated script file but NOT write the marker. Claude Code won't be alerted that the skill changed. Spec Inv 24a says 'whose destination matches ^\.claude/skills/([^/]+)/SKILL\.md$' — narrowly only SKILL.md — which matches code, but reality is skills can include other files that update independently of SKILL.md. Either broaden the marker trigger to any '.claude/skills/<name>/...' destination, or document that out-of-band skill-script updates are not signalled.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
